title: Velvety Spicy Middle Eastern Apricot Stir-fry
description: A cozy and spicy middle eastern dish featuring apricot jam in a velvety sauce, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine the apricot jam with salt. Heat over medium heat until slightly reduced and thickened.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic, sliced peppers, and onions; stir for about 2 minutes or until onions are translucent.
Add crushed coriander seeds (cumin) to the pan and stir for another minute.
Pour the reduced apricot jam into the skillet with vegetables and add turmeric powder and garam masala. Stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 15 minutes until the sauce has thickened slightly and vegetables are tender.
Serve hot as a side dish or over grilled meats.
